    A

    ActivityLevel - Enum Class in com.lockedin.lockedin.model.entity.user
    User activity level for TDEE calculation; display names match database values.

    Authentication - Class in com.lockedin.lockedin.controller.auth
    Coordinates credential validation, login, and shared authentication UI helpers.

    Creates an authentication helper using the application default user database.
    Authentication(UserDAO) - Constructor for class com.lockedin.lockedin.controller.auth.Authentication
    Creates an authentication helper with the supplied user data access object.

    F

    findExerciseIdByName(String) - Method in class com.lockedin.lockedin.model.dao.DBExercisesDAO
    Returns the DB id of an exercise whose name matches (case-insensitive), or 0 if not found.
    FitnessGoal - Enum Class in com.lockedin.lockedin.model.entity.user
    User fitness goal for calorie and macro targets; display names match database values.
    Food - Class in com.lockedin.lockedin.model.entity.diet
    Represents a food entry logged by a user, including macros and the consumption date.

    initialize() - Method in class com.lockedin.lockedin.controller.layout.LayoutController
    Initializes FXML-bound UI components after the view loads.
    initialize() - Method in class com.lockedin.lockedin.controller.workout.AiWorkoutController
    Initializes FXML-bound UI components after the view loads.
    initialize() - Method in class com.lockedin.lockedin.controller.workout.CreateWorkoutController
    Initializes the form: - Loads exercises from DB - Sets default values - Configures the exercise list cell factory
    initialize() - Method in class com.lockedin.lockedin.controller.workout.ExerciseViewController
    Initializes the exercise search view: - Loads exercises from the database - Configures visibility of the details pane - Adds listener to update details when an exercise is selected
    initialize() - Method in class com.lockedin.lockedin.controller.workout.StartWorkoutController
    Initializes FXML-bound UI components after the view loads.
    initialize() - Method in class com.lockedin.lockedin.controller.workout.WorkoutController
    Initializes FXML-bound UI components after the view loads.

    Initializes FXML-bound UI components after the view loads.

    Returns whether valid email.

    Checks whether a string represents a non-negative numeric value.
    isValidPassword(String) - Method in class com.lockedin.lockedin.controller.auth.Authentication
    Returns whether valid password.
